metadata.title: Mystik — Daily Horoscope & Synastry
metadata.description: Navigate the cosmos. Daily horoscopes, personalized readings, and synastry reports.

hero.heading: Discover what the stars have in store for you
hero.description: Navigate the cosmos of your own existence. We interpret the celestial language to bring you clarity, purpose, and connection with the universe.

personalized.title: Personalized Horoscope
personalized.description: Transit-based insights calculated from your natal chart for a reading that is uniquely yours.

horoscope.title: Daily Horoscope
horoscope.description: Get today's cosmic forecast for your zodiac sign — love, career, money, and health.

synastry.title: Synastry
synastry.description: Explore the astrological compatibility between two people with a full aspect-by-aspect report.

about.title: About Holistic Healing
about.description: Mystik offers astrological counseling and Reiki energy healing to help clients reach their greatest potential. By understanding the role that planetary cycles play in their lives, clients are empowered to make better decisions resulting in more rewarding and fulfilling lives.

horoscope.title: Choose your zodiac sign
horoscope.description: What's your sign? Discover your horoscope for today

personalized.title: Your Personal Cosmic Blueprint
personalized.description: Enter your birth details for a reading based on your unique natal chart and today's planetary transits

synastry_section.title: Cosmic Compatibility
synastry_section.description: Discover the astrological dynamics between you and another person

synastry_page.meta_description: Discover the astrological compatibility between two people with a full synastry report.

birth_form.time_unknown_note: Note: Accuracy for houses and ascendant will be limited. We'll use 12:00 PM as a default.

footer.description: Get a personal analysis of your current situation that will help you to find life-changing solutions in any sphere of your life.
